event: Loudoun Co. data center boom accelerates; county zoning fast-track enacted
Dominion Biennial Review rate case filed (DEV 2023)
SCC approves $565.7M Dominion rate increase; +$11.24/mo residential bill
New GS-5 data center rate class takes effect (Jan 1)
Data center buildout in Maricopa Co. accelerates post-COVID
APS rate case — first increase directly linked to data center load growth
APS testifies data centers caused 94% of all load growth 2023-2025
SRP passes rate hike structurally lower for data centers than residences
AEP Ohio data center load ~100 MW
AEP Ohio data center load reaches 600 MW (6x growth in 4 years)
PUCO orders AEP Ohio data-center-specific tariff (85% min demand, 12-yr contracts)
PUCO rate order reduces residential distribution costs by $1.22/mo for 18 months
PGE residential rates begin rapid climb (+7% in 2023, +18% in 2024, +5.5% in 2025)
Oregon passes law requiring data centers to pay their own infrastructure costs
Utility watchdogs accuse PGE of skirting new law; Oregon PUC opens review
